Request For Prove-Up Hearing For Court Judgement; Declaration By Albert K. Martin, Esq. In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Oct-31-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing on plaintiffs' action for Quiet Title.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR 6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Albert K. Martin, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Walter Strach, III, who was placed under oath and testified.
Plaintiff John Dunlap was not present as this morning's hearing.
Walter J. Strach, Jr., a witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath but did not testify.
No appearance by the defaulted defendants Susan M. Strach, et al.
Defaults were entered against defendants Susan M. Strach, Marshal Lynn Strach, Gary John Strach, Susan Dunlap, Walter J. Strach, Marsha Condon, Gary Strach, Katherine D. Strach, Patrica L. Strach, Jennifer Dunlap, Jill Dunlap, Justin Dunlap, Lea Strach, Karen Strach, Amy Condon Jermy Dunlap and Walter J. Dunlap as Trustee, on June 29, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on September 5, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Walter Strach, III and John Dunlap, and against the Defaulted Defendants, Susan M. Strach, et al., as follows:

The Court enters judgment quiting plaintiffs Walter Strach, III and John Dunlap's fee simple title to the disputed portion of the real property located at 327-335 23rd Avenue, San Francisco, CA, and defendants have not right, title or interest in or to be disputed portion of the real property.

Plaintiffs' counsel shall prepare the Proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
